title: Gardener lifecycle session corrupted multi-line python3 -c blocks in wai-enter.sh
description:
Gardener lifecycle session (commit 1efb086) collapsed all multi-line python3 -c heredoc-style blocks into single-line strings with literal 
 characters. This broke both bash (syntax error: BASHER_EXIT=$?
    if) and Python (rejects literal 
 as statement separator in -c mode). Six python3 blocks affected.
rationale: Multi-line python3 -c blocks in bash scripts must not be collapsed by automated tools. Any spoke with wai-enter.sh or similar inline Python is at risk. Mitigation: bash -n syntax check in pre-commit hook.
decision_reason: High-impact automation pattern. Routed to FRAMEWORK for fleet coordination.
